name: CITIGROUP INC
summary: Citigroup Inc. is a global financial services company providing a wide range of banking and financial products and services. Its businesses include Services (Treasury and Trade Solutions, Securities Services), Markets (fixed income, equities, derivatives), Banking (investment banking, corporate lending), Wealth management, and US Personal Banking (credit cards, retail banking). Citi operates across North America and internationally, serving consumers, corporations, governments, and institutions.

products.name: Treasury and Trade Solutions
products.description: Cash management and trade finance services for corporate and institutional clients.

products.name: Securities Services
products.description: Custody, clearing, and fund administration services for institutional clients.

products.name: Markets
products.description: Fixed income, equities, foreign exchange, and derivatives trading and market-making.

products.name: Investment Banking
products.description: Advisory, underwriting, and capital markets services for corporate clients.

products.name: Wealth Management
products.description: Financial planning, investment, and banking services for high-net-worth individuals.

products.name: US Personal Banking
products.description: Credit cards, retail banking, and consumer lending products for US individuals.

products.name: Capital Accumulation Program Awards
products.description: Deferred compensation awards for highly compensated employees as part of annual incentives.

partnerships.description: Equity contract arrangement referenced in connection with trading or financial instrument activities.
